compiled_state.title: stop hook friction_suggestion_check does not scan tool-use-*.jsonl as specified in d6b4-3217 DD
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: Story d6b4-3217 done definition requires the stop hook to scan both tool-error-counter.json AND tool-use-*.jsonl. Current implementation (hook_friction_suggestion_check in session-misc-functions.sh) reads only tool-error-counter.json. tool-use-*.jsonl scanning is not implemented.

comments.body: Fix applied: added tool-use-*.jsonl scanning to hook_friction_suggestion_check in plugins/dso/hooks/lib/session-misc-functions.sh. Reads today's $HOME/.claude/logs/tool-use-$(date +%Y-%m-%d).jsonl, counts post hook entries, triggers suggestion when count >= suggestion.tool_use_count_threshold (default 200). Fail-open: skips gracefully if file absent or malformed. RED test added to tests/hooks/test-stop-suggestion-hook.sh (3 new test cases: high-volume triggers, below-threshold no-trigger, absent-file no-crash). All 13 tests GREEN.
comments.author: Test
